name: Popverse: Bubble Shooter
description: Popverse is a bubble shooter game with 20 unique special bubbles and chain reactions. Aim and shoot to match colors. Special bubbles like Bombs, Rainbows, and Lightning create explosive combos. Encounter obstacles like Frozen, Stone, and Portal bubbles. Features include 500+ levels, random puzzles, a props system, daily rewards, and 3-star ratings.
instructions: Click and drag to aim your shooter Release to fire the bubble
